title: Where Do Deep-Research Agents Go Wrong? Span-Level Error Localization in Agent Trajectories
acquisition_scope: Immutable arXiv v2 paper; acquisition-time pinned official NJU-LINK/DRIFT GitHub repository; acquisition-time pinned official NJU-LINK/TELBench Hugging Face dataset.

paper.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; UTF-8 text with page breaks preserved
paper.extraction_verification: Non-empty 1,810-line extraction inspected at the title/abstract, main text, and final appendix prompt; pdfinfo reports 28 pages.

github_release.mutability_boundary: GitHub branch names are mutable. The commit SHA and commit-addressed archive pin the acquired code snapshot.

huggingface_release.access_conditions: Public, ungated Apache-2.0 dataset. Encryption only suppresses viewer expansion; the public passphrase is included in the same pinned release. Decrypted locally with openssl AES-256-CBC, PBKDF2, 200000 iterations and verified against the publisher-provided plaintext checksum.
huggingface_release.inspectability: The decrypted JSONL was parsed successfully and is inspectable local evidence, not merely encrypted presence.
huggingface_release.mutability_boundary: The dataset repository is mutable. All downloads used the acquisition-time commit revision above; local publisher checksums verify encrypted and plaintext bytes.

review_boundary: This record establishes source acquisition, successful extraction, release pinning, decryption, integrity, and a structural inventory only. It is not a deep methodological review and does not validate the paper's localization, root-cause, monitoring-utility, or professional-validity claims.
